basic_details.job_title: CSIR NEERI Senior Project Associate Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online
basic_details.organization_name: National Environmental Engineering Research Center (CSIR NEERI)
basic_details.short_information: National Environmental Engineering Research Institute (CSIR NEERI) Senior Project Associate Notification 2026 has been released on the official website neeri.res.in. A total of 1 Senior Project Associate vacancy has been announced through the CSIR NEERI Senior Project Associate Recruitment 2026.

qualification.education_qualification: B.E./ B.Tech. in Environmental Engineering, M.Sc. in Environmental Science/Environmental Management/Chemistry with 3 years experience, M.E./M.Tech. in Environmental Engineering/Environmental Management, Ph.D. in Environmental Science/Env. Engineering/Env. Management/Chemistry with 2 years experience
qualification.details: Senior Project Associate: B.E./ B.Tech. in Environmental Engineering OR M.Sc. in Environmental Science /Environmental Management/Chemistry AND 03 years’ experience in R&D in Industrial & Academic Institutions or Science and Technology Organisations, and Scientific Activities and Services. OR M.E./M.Tech. in Environmental Engineering/Environmental Management OR Ph.D. in Environmental Science/ Env. Engineering/ Env. Management/ Chemistry AND 2 years of experience in Research and Development in Industrial and Academic Institutions or Science and Technology Organizations and Scientific activities and services.

salary_details.details: Rs. 42000 Per Month + HRA as per norms

how_to_apply: Applications must be submitted online on or before 20-07-2026.
To apply directly, use the Apply Online link provided in the Important Links section.
Alternatively, candidates may visit the official website of CSIR NEERI to complete the application.
Fill out the application form carefully with correct personal, educational, and contact details.
Upload required documents such as photograph, signature, and certificates in the prescribed format.
Pay the application fee online, if applicable.
Review all details carefully before submitting the form.
Take a printout or save a copy of the submitted application for future reference.

Eligibility Criteria
content_sections.text: Senior Project Associate: B.E./ B.Tech. in Environmental Engineering OR M.Sc. in Environmental Science /Environmental Management/Chemistry AND 03 years’ experience in R&D in Industrial & Academic Institutions or Science and Technology Organisations, and Scientific Activities and Services. OR M.E./M.Tech. in Environmental Engineering/Environmental Management OR Ph.D. in Environmental Science/ Env. Engineering/ Env. Management/ Chemistry AND 2 years of experience in Research and Development in Industrial and Academic Institutions or Science and Technology Organizations and Scientific activities and services.

content_sections.heading: How to Apply
content_sections.text: Applications must be submitted online on or before 20-07-2026. To apply directly, use the Apply Online link provided in the Important Links section. Alternatively, candidates may visit the official website of CSIR NEERI to complete the application. Fill out the application form carefully with correct personal, educational, and contact details. Upload required documents such as photograph, signature, and certificates in the prescribed format. Pay the application fee online, if applicable. Review all details carefully before submitting the form. Take a printout or save a copy of the submitted application for future reference.

content_sections.heading: CSIR NEERI Senior Project Associate Recruitment 2026 - Important Links

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the CSIR NEERI Senior Project Associate recruitment?
faq.answer: The last date to submit the online application form for the CSIR NEERI Senior Project Associate position is 20th July 2026. Ensure your application is submitted well before this deadline.

faq.question: Q2. How many vacancies are available for the Senior Project Associate post?
faq.answer: There is one vacancy available for the Senior Project Associate post at the National Environmental Engineering Research Center (CSIR NEERI) as per the latest recruitment notification.

faq.question: Q3. What is the educational qualification required for the Senior Project Associate role?
faq.answer: Candidates need a B.E./B.Tech. in Environmental Engineering, M.Sc. in Environmental Science/Management/Chemistry with 3 years of experience, M.E./M.Tech. in Environmental Engineering/Management, or a Ph.D. in relevant fields with 2 years of experience.

faq.question: Q4. What is the age limit for applying to this position?
faq.answer: The maximum age limit for candidates applying for the Senior Project Associate position is 40 years. Age relaxation details are not specified in the provided data.

faq.question: Q5. What is the salary offered for the Senior Project Associate position?
faq.answer: The selected candidate will receive a salary of Rs. 42,000 per month, along with HRA as per norms.

faq.question: Q6. Is there an application fee for this recruitment?
faq.answer: No, there is no application fee mentioned for any category (General/OBC, SC/ST) for this recruitment drive.

faq.question: Q7. What is the mode of application for the CSIR NEERI Senior Project Associate recruitment?
faq.answer: The application process for this recruitment is entirely online. Candidates must submit their applications through the official website or the provided online application link.

faq.question: Q8. What is the selection process for the Senior Project Associate role?
faq.answer: The selection process for the Senior Project Associate position will be based on an Online Interview. Candidates will be shortlisted based on their qualifications and experience.

faq.question: Q9. Is this a permanent government job?
faq.answer: This is a contractual job opportunity at the National Environmental Engineering Research Center (CSIR NEERI). The tenure and terms of employment will be as per the contract.

faq.question: Q10. Where can I find the official notification and apply online?
faq.answer: The official notification PDF and the online application link can be found in the "Important Links" section of this article. The official website of CSIR NEERI is also provided.
